# investigate-event

Presentational sub-plugin exporting `InvestigateEventButton`. It is used by the
JSONL viewer's fallback rows (the unknown-event renderer and the generic
attachment view) to surface a small hover-revealed icon button. Clicking it opens
the shared `LaunchAgentPopover`, seeding a new standalone conversation whose
prompt contains the raw event JSON plus the source conversation id, so an agent
can investigate why the event fell back to a generic renderer. The plugin has no
slot contributions — callers import the component directly.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Presentational hover-revealed button on JSONL fallback rows that launches an investigation agent seeded with the raw event JSON and source conversation id.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/launch.LaunchAgentPopover`
  - Exports: Values: `InvestigateEventButton`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/attachment`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/unknown`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
